title: Coding question body
description: JSONB shape stored in question_versions.body for coding-type questions authored by the assessment.coding plugin. References language.* plugin slugs (not the legacy 'coding:python' pricing strings).

promptFormat.description: Renderer hint. New questions default to markdown; existing seeded questions are stamped 'html' by migration 013.

prompt.description: Body in the format named by promptFormat.

allowedLanguages.description: Optional per-question restriction. Plugin slugs. Omit to inherit the exam-section's allowed languages.

entryFile.description: Per-language entry file. Keys are language slugs (language.python, …). Required when starterFiles has multiple files for that language; falls back to LanguageConfig.defaultEntryFile otherwise.

starterCode.description: Shorthand for single-file questions. Keys are language slugs. Equivalent to a one-element starterFiles entry per language. Back-compatible with existing seed shape.

starterFiles.description: Per-language starter file sets, multi-file aware.

path.description: Workspace-relative path. Must not contain '..' segments.

readOnly.description: If true the entire file is locked: the candidate's submitted content must match the snapshot byte-for-byte. Backend rejects modifications with LOCKED_FILE_MODIFIED.

lockedRegions.description: Optional region-level locks within the file. Backend rejects modifications inside any locked region with LOCKED_REGION_MODIFIED, returning startLine + endLine + reason.

language.description: Monaco language hint for files whose extension is ambiguous (README.md, etc.).

samples.description: Visible-to-candidate example I/O. Distinct from question_test_cases — these are documentation, not graded.

pretext.description: Optional code block shown above the prompt.

judgeConfig.description: Per-question overrides for judging behavior. Defaults inherit from the language plugin's runtime config.
